objective: Find an MCP server that can rank AI tools for a coding objective.

top_candidates.name: AI Objective Index read-only MCP tools
top_candidates.why_relevant: Matches objective-to-capability discovery and returns source traces, missing fields, and decision receipts.
top_candidates.next_action: Run preflight before any recommendation or tool use; keep output read-only until permission scope is explicit.
must_not_claim: AOI clears legal, privacy, license, or compliance status
AOI proves product readiness or quality

top_candidates.name: AgentSec local manifest review
top_candidates.why_relevant: Useful when the candidate is a tool or MCP manifest and an agent needs permission or hidden-instruction review.
top_candidates.next_action: Request an owner-provided local manifest and run only local/offline review.
must_not_claim: AOI clears legal, privacy, license, or compliance status
AOI proves product readiness or quality

top_candidates.name: DataCapsule local corpus manifest review
top_candidates.why_relevant: Useful when the objective depends on dataset, corpus, privacy, rights, or eval-leakage boundaries.
top_candidates.next_action: Ask for a local corpus manifest; do not inspect raw private data or authorize training/action use.
must_not_claim: AOI clears legal, privacy, license, or compliance status
AOI proves product readiness or quality

best_current_candidate.name: AI Objective Index read-only MCP tools
best_current_candidate.why_relevant: Matches objective-to-capability discovery and returns source traces, missing fields, and decision receipts.
best_current_candidate.next_action: Run preflight before any recommendation or tool use; keep output read-only until permission scope is explicit.
must_not_claim: AOI clears legal, privacy, license, or compliance status
AOI proves product readiness or quality

next_action: Ask for permission scope or manifest metadata, then rerun preflight.
must_not_claim: AOI clears legal, privacy, license, or compliance status
AOI proves product readiness or quality

freshness.stale_warning: sample data is static and should be refreshed before external use
freshness.refresh_next_action: refresh source traces or keep candidate in HOLD_STALE_METADATA before recommending external use

notes: AOI-guided fixture keeps useful candidates visible while preserving pre-use trust routing.
